description: This established laundromat in a rural Midwest town has been serving the community for over 25 years. The business generates an annual gross revenue of $50,000 with a cash flow of $18,000. It operates with minimal staff, currently employing one part-time worker. The facility includes 15 washers and 12 dryers, all in good working condition, with some recent updates to equipment. The owner is retiring after many years of successful operation and is motivated to sell quickly. This is a turnkey opportunity for a new owner to step in with minimal transition effort. Rent for the location is $800/month with a long-term lease available.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring after many years of operation

description: This vending machine route in suburban Florida consists of 10 machines placed in high-traffic locations such as offices, schools, and gyms. The business grosses $35,000 annually with a cash flow of $12,000. It is owner-operated, requiring approximately 10-15 hours per week for restocking and maintenance. Machines are modern with card payment options. The owner is selling due to retirement and a desire to relocate out of state. This is a low-overhead business with room for expansion by adding more machines or locations. All contracts with location owners will transfer to the new buyer.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring and relocating out of state

description: This small lawn care and landscaping business serves a loyal client base in a small Texas town. With annual gross revenue of $45,000 and cash flow of $15,000, it provides a steady income for an owner-operator. Established in 2010, the business comes with a client list of 30 recurring residential accounts, basic equipment (mowers, trimmers, trailer), and a solid reputation for reliability. It employs two seasonal workers during peak months. The owner is retiring due to age and health concerns and is highly motivated to sell. This is an ideal opportunity for someone looking to enter the landscaping industry with an established operation.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring due to age and health concerns

description: This small snack shop, located on a busy corner in a small city in Ohio, has been a community staple for over 30 years. The business grosses $60,000 annually with a net cash flow of $20,000 after expenses. It sells snacks, drinks, lottery tickets, and basic convenience items, with inventory included in the sale (approx. $5,000 value). The shop operates in a leased space with a reasonable rent of $800/month and a 3-year lease remaining. The owner currently runs the shop with help from one part-time employee during peak hours. There is potential to increase revenue by extending hours or adding delivery services. Detailed financials provided to qualified buyers.
seller_motivation: Owner, a Baby Boomer, is ready to retire after decades of running the business and wants to travel.

description: This residential and small office cleaning service has been operating in a rural Pennsylvania area for 13 years. The business generates $40,000 in annual gross revenue with a net cash flow of $14,000. It serves a loyal base of 25 regular clients, with most on weekly or bi-weekly schedules. The sale includes a client list, basic equipment (vacuums, supplies), and a branded van valued at $5,000. The owner operates the business with occasional help from a contractor for larger jobs. This is a low-overhead, home-based business with flexible hours and potential to grow by marketing to nearby towns or adding staff. Financial records are available for review.
seller_motivation: Owner is retiring due to age and wishes to downsize responsibilities.

description: This well-established laundromat has been serving the community for over 18 years. Located in a small town in Ohio, it generates an annual gross revenue of $60,000 with a net cash flow of $20,000. The business operates with minimal staff, currently employing one part-time worker. Equipment includes 15 washers and 12 dryers, all in good working condition with regular maintenance. The owner is selling due to retirement and is willing to provide training during the transition period. This is a turnkey operation with a loyal customer base in a high-traffic area.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring after 18 years of successful operation.

description: This vending machine route consists of 20 machines placed in high-traffic locations such as offices, schools, and gyms across a suburban area in Texas. Established in 2010, the business generates $40,000 in annual gross revenue with a net cash flow of $15,000. The operation is owner-operated, requiring approximately 10-15 hours per week to restock and maintain machines. All machines are in good condition, with some recently upgraded. The owner is selling due to retirement and is open to providing a detailed transition plan to the new owner.
seller_motivation: Owner is retiring and looking to pass on the business.

description: This small residential and commercial cleaning service has been operating for 15 years in a rural area of North Carolina. The business brings in an annual gross revenue of $55,000 with a net cash flow of $18,000. It currently employs 2 part-time staff members who handle most of the cleaning contracts. The owner manages scheduling and client relations but is stepping away due to health concerns. The sale includes all equipment (vacuums, cleaning supplies, etc.) and an established client list of over 30 recurring customers. This is a great opportunity for someone looking for a steady, low-overhead business.
seller_motivation: Owner selling due to health issues and inability to continue managing the business.

description: This charming flower shop has been a staple in a small Michigan city for 20 years. With an annual gross revenue of $48,000 and a net cash flow of $16,000, it offers a stable income for a new owner. The business employs one full-time staff member and hires seasonal help during peak times like Valentine’s Day and Mother’s Day. The shop is located in a leased space with favorable terms and comes with all inventory, fixtures, and a loyal customer base. The current owner is retiring after two decades and is eager to see the business continue under new ownership. Training and support will be provided during the transition.
seller_motivation: Owner retiring after 20 years in business.
